# Find your horizon

#### At Skye Summit

Nestled beside Red Rock Canyon, Skye Summit offers an escape into nature with cooler air, scenic trails, and space to breathe.  
Designed as a master-planned community for families of all ages, it blends outdoor adventure with wellness and connection at the western edge of Centennial Hills, just beyond the 215 beltway near Providence and Skye Hills.

COMING FALL 2027

# Designed

##### WITH THE DESERT IN MIND

Skye Summit offers everything from stylish townhomes to spacious forever homes, perfect for nature lovers at every stage of life. Elevated homesites, desert-conscious lighting and landscaping, and panoramic views surround you at every turn, creating a community that feels both grounded in nature and elevated in experience.

# The Canyon

##### CONNECTION

Own the edge of the West, where the trails of Skye Summit connect directly to the protected landscapes of Red Rock Canyon. Here, you can help preserve what makes this place special, with opportunities to adopt and enhance local trails, support conservation efforts, and be part of a community rooted in giving back to the desert that surrounds it.

# Adventure Out

##### CONNECT WITHIN.

Adventure begins just beyond your doorstep. Connection starts right at home. With safe, walkable streets, welcoming parks, and community events that celebrate the natural surroundings, Skye Summit is where neighbors come together and life is shaped by the beauty all around us.

# Cooler Days

##### & STARRY SKIES

From sunlit trails to star-filled skies, Skye Summit’s higher elevation brings cooler temperatures, making outdoor living more comfortable. With a focus on balance, wellness, and time outdoors, it’s a place that supports a healthier, more grounded way of living for families of all ages.

# Thoughtfully Developed

##### BY OLYMPIA COMPANIES

From the team behind Southern Highlands, Skye Canyon, and Skye Hills, this community reflects a continued commitment to building neighborhoods that feel connected, balanced, and elevated. With decades of exper

results.title: A New 3,500-home Community Is Coming — And It Tells Us A Lot About 2026 | Jennifer Graff
excerpts:
KB Home's neighborhood, Vertice at Skye Summit, will include 299 homesites, with development starting this summer and sales expected in early 2027. Translation?

# A New 3,500-home Community Is Coming — And It Tells Us A Lot About 2026

* [Market Update](https://jennifergraffrealtor.com/market-update/)

Aerial view of Las Vegas residential community with Skye Summit sign.

### Contents

If you’ve been wondering whether Las Vegas is actually _slowing down_ … this story says otherwise.

Quietly — and very deliberately — a brand-new master-planned community just took its **first real step forward** on the outer edge of the northwest valley. And the buyer? One of the biggest builders in the country.

Here’s the dish. ☕️

unnamed (15)

### The Big Move No One’s Overhyping (Yet)

According to a recent report from the **Las Vegas Review-Journal** , **KB Home** just purchased **38\.6 acres** along **Tropical Parkway** , west of the 215 Beltway, for **$46.4 million** .

That land sits inside **Skye Summit** , a **505-acre** master-planned community approved for **3,500 homes** .

This matters because:

* It’s the **first builder land sale** in Skye Summit
* It signals real momentum — not just planning talk
* And it tells us builders are still betting big on Las Vegas

KB Home’s neighborhood, **Vertice at Skye Summit** , will include **299 homesites** , with development starting this summer and **sales expected in early 2027** .

Translation? Builders aren’t pulling back — they’re positioning.

unnamed (14)

### Follow the Master Plan Money

Skye Summit is being developed by **Olympia Companies** , the same firm behind **Skye Canyon** and **Southern Highlands** .

If that sounds familiar, it should. This is the same long-term playbook Las Vegas has used successfully for decades:

* Large land acquisition
* Infrastructure first (roads, trails, utilities)
* Parks and open space baked in
* Builders come in _after_ the groundwork is done

They’re also planning a **20-acre park** immediately adjacent to the community — not an afterthought, but a feature.

And yes, this follows the same DNA that made **Summerlin** one of the most successful master-planned communities in the country.

unnamed (16)

### So… Will Buying Be More Affordable This Year?

Here’s where this gets interesting.

New land sales like this don’t mean prices are about to fall off a cliff — but they _do_ point to **future supply** , and supply is the pressure valve this market has needed.

What this signa

results.title: Las Vegas Real Estate Projects to Watch for in 2026
excerpts:
6

January 31, 2026

Las Vegas Real Estate Projects

## Las Vegas Real Estate Projects to Watch for in 2026

Las Vegas continues to grow, evolve, and attract major development, and 2026 is shaping up to be a big year for new real estate projects across the valley. From large master-planned communities to major retail and lifestyle developments, these projects will help shape where people live, shop, and spend time in the years ahead. Here are some of the most notable Las Vegas real estate projects to watch for in 2026.

1. ### **BLUE DIAMOND HILL**

Las Vegas developer Jim Rhodes plans to begin construction on his long-proposed Blue Diamond Hill housing project in 2026. The 2,000-acre hilltop development near Red Rock Canyon is planned for about 3,500 homes.

Gary Mayo, president of Harmony Homes, will oversee the project, with grading expected to start in early 2026 and home construction by the end of the year.

1. ### **SKYE SUMMIT**

Skye Summit is a new, upcoming master-planned residential community in northwest Las Vegas, near Centennial Hills and is being developed by Olympia Companies. It will encompass 505 acres and has been approved for 3,500 homes.

Construction on the Skye Summit is expected to break ground in early 2026, with the full development planned for completion by 2034-2035. So far, the builders in Skye Summit will be Pulte Homes, Taylor Morrison, KB Homes and Tri-Pointe Homes.

In December 2025 KB Homes purchased around 38.6 for $46.4 million, property records show. This marks the first land closing by a builder in the new Skye Summit master-planned community. This new community will be called Vertice at Skye Summit and will have 299 single-family homesites. The builders expect to begin land development this summer and open for sale in early 2027.

1. ### **HYLO PARK**

California-based Agora Realty & Management is developing Hylo Park, a mixed-use project in North Las Vegas on the former Texas Station and Fiesta Rancho sites. The first phase includes a 90,000-square-foot retail plaza anchored by a Cardenas grocery store, with businesses expected to open in 2026. Construction on the former Fiesta Rancho portion is planned to begin in early 2026.

1. ### **LIFETIME FITNESS**

Luxury fitness chain Life Time is building a 128,000-square-foot health club near Durango Drive and Sunset Road in southwest Las Vegas. Located across from Ikea, the facility will feature pickleball courts, pools, group classes, and a full hydrotherapy suite, with

# Centennial Hills Homes for Sale in Las Vegas
One of the newer master-planned communities in the Las Vegas Valley, Centennial Hills is located in the northwest corner foothills of [Las Vegas](https://www.brownellteamrealtors.com/las-vegas-nv/) .  Bounded by the Red Rock Preservation Area to the west, Centennial Hills offers easy access to the I-95 and 215 Beltway and is approximately 30 minutes from the Las Vegas Strip. The 56 square mile community of Centennial Hills offers a variety of housing choices including single-family homes, condos, townhomes, horse properties, semi-custom homes, and luxury custom homes on acreage (89129 & 89149), with incredible city and mountain views. **Centennial Hills real estate - Las Vegas NV** covers 3 zip codes: 89130, 89131, and 89149. **_Read more about Centennial Hills real estate & lifestyle.._ .**
View the newest **Centennial Hills homes for sale in Las Vegas NV,** updated every 15 minutes from the Greater Las Vegas MLS.

#### Centennial Hills Schools
Centennial Hills is served by the [Clark County School District](https://www.ccsd.net/) , one of the largest districts in the country. excerpts:
# Centennial Hills
Area Centennial Hills
Featured Listings Market Report Top Schools Around The Area Local Advice
Search For Listings

## Northwest valley • ±65,000 residents • ±22,000 housing units • median build-year 1998
Centennial Hills stretches from U.S. 95 west to the 215 Beltway at the base of the Sheep and Spring Mountains—about fifteen miles northwest of the Strip. Inside this twelve-square-mile “city within a city,” modern master-planned villages sit beside half-acre ranch properties and brand-new hillside estates, all at price points still below neighboring Summerlin. Condos and townhomes begin in the mid-$300 Ks, most three- and four-bedroom single-family homes run from the mid-$400 Ks to the high-$700 Ks, and guard-gated golf homes or custom builds in Skye Canyon, Painted Desert and Tule Springs often clear the million-dollar mark.

...

A Quick Snapshot of Standouts

# The Real Cost of Living in Las Vegas: Understanding HOA Fees
## SIDs and LIDs: The Hidden "HOA" Cousin
While not technically an HOA fee, Special Improvement Districts (SIDs) and Limited Improvement Districts (LIDs) are critical to understand when [buying new construction in Las Vegas](https://www.nevadarealestategroup.com/blog/new-home-developments-in-las-vegas/) or homes built in the last 20 years.
Think of SIDs/LIDs as a way to repay the bond used to build the infrastructure—the roads, sewers, streetlights, and fire hydrants—surrounding your community.
* **How they differ from HOAs:** An HOA fee is for perpetual maintenance. A SID/LID is a fixed debt with a payoff date (usually 10 to 20 years).
* **The Cost:** In newer areas like Summerlin West or Skye Canyon, these assessments can add **$1,000 to $3,000 per year** to your carrying costs.
* **Payment:** You can usually pay them monthly, semi-annually (often June and December), or pay off the principal in a lump sum.

...

## Frequently Asked Questions About Las Vegas HOAs

Avery Pointe by Lennar homes is a gated community offering brand-new single-family homes for sale in Northwest Las Vegas off of Azure and Puli in the 89166 zip code. This community offers 3 single-story floor plans to choose from ranging in size from 2,448 to 2,668 sq. ft., with 3 to 4 bedrooms, 2.5 to 3 bathrooms, and 3 car-garages or 4 Bay RV Garage. results.title: Clark County School District breaks ground on new Skye Canyon Elementary School
excerpts:
# Clark County School District breaks ground on new Skye Canyon Elementary School
## New campus will serve 850 students in northwest Las Vegas
By Rachel Zalucki
Published: Jun. 22, 2026 at 8:32 AM PDT | Updated: 3 hours ago
Share
[Add Us On Google Add as a preferred source on Google](https://google.com/preferences/source?q=https://www.fox5vegas.com)
LAS VEGAS ( [FOX5](http://fox5vegas.com/ "http://fox5vegas.com/") ) — Clark County School District broke ground Monday on a new elementary school in the northwest valley.
Skye Canyon Elementary School will serve up to 850 students in 53 classrooms when it opens in August 2027.
“We’re really excited today. We have a groundbreaking for our newest coming elementary school here at Sky Canyon and Schaumburg, up here in the northwest part of the valley,” said Jesse Welsh, deputy superintendent of teaching and learning for Clark County School District.
The school has been part of the district’s bond program for several years.
“Big thanks to our legislature for continuing to renew that,” Welsh said. “This has been one that’s been on the docket for several years now, and we’re at the point where we’re ready to move forward and break ground with the school opening for the 27-28 school year.”
The northwest valley has seen significant growth in recent years, creating a need for additional school capacity.
“Despite the fact that we have other parts of the valley where we have declining enrollment, we have a lot of growth up here in the northwest, and so we have a need for additional school capacity up here,” Welsh said.
The groundbreaking ceremony was attended by CCSD Board of School Trustees Clerk Lydia Dominguez, Board Member Lisa Satory, Superintendent Jhone Ebert, Deputy Superintendent of Business Operations Felicia Gonzales, Welsh and Chief of Facilities Brandon McLaughlin.
The new campus is located at 8401 N. Shaumber Road in Las Vegas.

The community is coming Fall 2027. KB Home’s Vertice at Skye Summit (299 homesites) may begin sales early 2027, and Woodside Homes is also planned among the first builders.
